videos.title: 9th Annual Will Bike 4 Food charity cycling event returns in Hatfield
videos.description: The 9th annual Will Bike 4 Food charity cycling event will take place Sunday in Hatfield.
videos.transcript:
the food bank of Western Massachusetts
is holding its ninth annual will bike
for food charity cycling event in
Hatfield today more than 440 cyclists of
all ages are registered to ride one of
four different routes through the
Pioneer Valley to raise awareness of
hunger making this year's expected
turnout the largest in the rides history
since will bike for food began in 2011
the event has raised nearly 700 700 ten
thousand dollars providing more than 2
million meals to those in need
throughout Western Massachusetts in the
event will be emceed by our very own
22news storm team meteorologist Brian
lapis
